name: Stripe
security: Never expose STRIPE_SECRET_KEY in client components.
Always verify webhook signatures with the official SDK.
Treat webhooks as the source of truth for subscription state, not success_url.
Use restricted API keys (rk_) for server tasks that don't need full secret-key scope.
Set up a separate webhook secret per environment.
Never log raw payment payloads — Stripe IDs only.

patterns.name: Hosted Checkout
patterns.description: Create a Checkout Session server-side, redirect the user, handle completion via webhook.

patterns.name: Customer Portal
patterns.description: Generate a Billing Portal session so customers can self-serve subscription changes and invoices.

patterns.name: Webhook-driven sync
patterns.description: Listen to customer.subscription.* and invoice.* events and sync state into your own database.

patterns.name: Embedded Payment Element
patterns.description: Use the Payment Element for an in-app checkout when redirecting away from your domain isn't acceptable.

triggers.name: Customer created
triggers.description: Fires when a new Customer record is created in Stripe.

triggers.name: Subscription created
triggers.description: Fires when a customer starts a new subscription.

triggers.name: Subscription canceled
triggers.description: Fires when a subscription is canceled (immediately or at period end).

triggers.name: Invoice paid
triggers.description: Fires when an invoice is successfully paid.

triggers.name: Invoice payment failed
triggers.description: Fires when a recurring invoice payment fails — useful for dunning flows.

triggers.name: Checkout session completed
triggers.description: Fires when a hosted Checkout Session is completed by the customer.

actions.name: Create subscription
actions.description: Subscribe a customer to one or more prices.

actions.name: Create checkout session
actions.description: Generate a hosted Checkout Session URL.

actions.name: Refund a charge
actions.description: Refund all or part of a previous charge.

actions.name: Send invoice
actions.description: Finalize a draft invoice and email it to the customer.

auth.description: Server-side API key (sk_live_… or rk_… restricted key). Required for all Stripe API calls.
Webhook signing secret to verify incoming Stripe webhook events.
